name: Chandralok Girl's Hostel
address: MIT AOE Road, Vishweshwar Nagar, Alandi, Pune, Maharashtra 412105
description: One of the most popular girls hostels near MITAOE. Provides full 3-meal mess service, round-the-clock security, high-speed Wi-Fi, and laundry facilities. Located just 0.5 km from the college gate on MIT AOE Road.

name: Hustlers Oasis | Rajvir
address: Tapkir Colony 1, Alandi - Moshi Rd, in front of HP Petrol Pump, Alandi, Maharashtra 412105
description: A premium boys PG featuring AC rooms, daily food service, full power backup, and professional housekeeping. Located opposite the HP petrol pump on Alandi-Moshi Road, ideal for students who want modern comfort.

name: Hooliv Anaya PG
address: Near MIT Academy of Engineering, Kelgaon, Alandi, Pune, Maharashtra 412105
description: A well-known co-ed PG managed by Hooliv, one of India's leading managed accommodation brands. Offers double-sharing rooms with power backup, Wi-Fi, TV lounge, and regular food service. Just 0.3 km from MITAOE.

name: Pasaydan Boys Hostel
address: MVFR+XQM, Kate Patil Nagar, Alandi, Maharashtra 412105
description: The official MITAOE-affiliated boys hostel, directly on campus. Features the college's own mess facility, RO-purified drinking water, and high-speed internet. Triple-sharing rooms, the closest option to the college at just 100 m.

name: Dnyanvardhini Girls Hostel
address: Near MIT College, Tapkir Nagar, Alandi, Pune, Maharashtra 412105
description: The official MITAOE girls hostel featuring biometric entry, 24x7 high security, dedicated study rooms, and campus Wi-Fi. Parents' favourite due to its strict security protocols and proximity to college — only 0.2 km away.

name: Tuljai Niwas PG
description: A secure and comfortable girls PG in Kelgaon with AC rooms, attached washrooms per room, 24x7 water supply, and CCTV coverage throughout. Popular among girls for its privacy-first setup and proximity to MITAOE.

name: Royal Residency PG
description: One of the premium boys PGs near MITAOE, offering AC double-sharing rooms, 3 full meals per day, uninterrupted power backup, and dedicated parking. A top pick for students seeking hotel-like comfort at a student-friendly price.

name: Prayag Boys Hostel
address: Kate Patil Nagar, Alandi, Pune, Maharashtra 412105
description: A budget-friendly boys hostel ideal for students who prioritise location over luxury. Just 0.4 km from the MITAOE gate, with RO-purified drinking water, basic Wi-Fi, and a shared mess at very affordable monthly rates.
